qcSource: Author Test Cases - Instruction for Teacher.pdf

legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires Studio/activity bootstrap, applied-style render, per-element drop, Preview/Reader/Publish, or persistence flows.

mappings.it: TC_01/TC_02/TC_03 — Authoring shell + Instructions page load (bootstrap)
mappings.note: Studio launch is harness bootstrap (cy.openAuthoringTool); page-load result asserted. Listing-page flow itself deferred.

mappings.reason: Create math activity (basic info) — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM
